creator: satosi.kimura@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 176372
patch for sbcl 1.3.11

 I can install latest sbcl (1.3.11) to FreeBSD/amd64 10.3

1. download binaries
 As sbcl 1.3.9, new binaries (version 1.2.7) are essential.

2. modify original files in ports/sbcl and make
 Same as sbcl 1.3.9.

3. check by portlint
 Same as sbcl 1.3.9, 1.3.10.

4. check by poudriere
 See sbcl-1.3.11,1.log shown as attachment.
